advancements.jerotesvillage.villager_cra: Using Copper and Iron to make Villager Metal Base
advancements.jerotesvillage.copper_carve: Make a suit of armor using Villager Metal
advancements.jerotesvillage.villager_war: Summoning a Carved Iron Golem Warrior
advancements.jerotesvillage.liberty_lead: Under the high relationship with the Copper Carved Company, make Copper Carved Company follow
advancements.jerotesvillage.round_trip_f: Get the Second Round World Teleport Stone
advancements.jerotesvillage.disarmed.des: Destroy both weapon arms of a Firepower Pourer
advancements.jerotesvillage.coven.title: Coven
advancements.jerotesvillage.ocean_gemsto: Craft an Ocean Gemstone using fragments from Gemstone Gravel
advancements.jerotesvillage.crisp.title: Crisp
advancements.jerotesvillage.gift_for_you: Offering a Flower to Harmonious Slime
block.jerotesvillage.villager_metal_door: Will only be opened by villagers and players
block.jerotesvillage.villager_metal_pres: Will only be triggered by villagers
block.jerotesvillage.carved_lodestone.de: A gathering point that facilitates of Copper Carved Company
item.jerotesvillage.villager_metal_javel: As a projectile, it has excellent ejection effect
item.jerotesvillage.shrapnel_launcher.de: Holding gunpowder/rocket/firework star can shoot multishot
This effect is compatible with Multishot enchantments
item.jerotesvillage.illager_signal_light: Obtain Bad Omen effect after use, the more use it, the higher the level
item.jerotesvillage.carved_flag.desc_0: Carved mercenaries will follow this flag
item.jerotesvillage.carved_flag.desc_1: For Carved mercenaries to use can confirm if this trusts you
item.jerotesvillage.carved_flag.desc_2: Shift key down and click block can activate and enter cooling
item.jerotesvillage.carved_flag.desc_3: After activation, Can enable followers to engage in normal combat
item.jerotesvillage.carved_contacter.des: Can be used to view the relationship value with the Copper Carved Company
When the relationship value is high, shift key down use can transport Copper Carved Company within a certain distance to nearby locations
Can bind Carved Lodestonet to change the transport position  in the same dimension
item.jerotesvillage.carved_horn.desc: Give gain to nearby Copper Carved Company
item.jerotesvillage.spear_machine_item.d: Use Spear to tame and attack targets
Right click on Spear Machine to restore health
item.jerotesvillage.carved_iron_golem_co: Use Iron Golem to transform it into a Carved Iron Golem
Using emerald on Carved Iron Golem can temporarily enhance their power And become a state of trust
Carved Iron Golem will follow players holding Carved Flag
block.jerotesvillage.second_round_anchor: Determines whether certain mobs reappear in structure
Can only unfold in the Overworld
item.jerotesvillage.nether_magic_map.des: Can only unfold in the Nether
item.jerotesvillage.end_magic_map.desc: Can only unfold in the End
item.jerotesvillage.guidelines_for_the_c: Guidelines for The Craft of The Second Rounder Gem
Can be forged into Second Round World Teleport Stone together with Second Rounder Gem and Eye of Ender
item.jerotesvillage.second_rounder_gem.d: Can be forged into Second Round World Teleport Stone together with Guidelines for The Craft of The Second Rounder Gem and Eye of Ender
item.jerotesvillage.second_round_world_t: The path to the Second Round World is already broken; now, some can leave, but no one can enter.
When located in the Overworld, can be used for teleportation with the Second Round World
When located in the Second Round World, besides teleportation, it can sneak to bind positions and be used for teleportation around the Second Round Worldl
When in place, it can be used for stealth to unbind
item.jerotesvillage.binding_second_round: Binding Second Round World Teleport Stone
item.jerotesvillage.glory_banner_raid_ta: Use it. Prove that you are fearless, curious, confident... and an idiot.
item.jerotesvillage.warlock_tiara.desc_0: The wearer can reduce Magic Resistance damage by 20%
item.jerotesvillage.warlock_tiara.desc_1: The wearer is hit, there is a high chance to teleport to an ally or a non-hostile raider to take the damage on their behalf.
item.jerotesvillage.warlock_tiara.desc_2: The wearer is hit, there is 20% chance to trigger Evil Summoning,50% chance to trigger Ominous Gear.
item.jerotesvillage.warlock_cassock.desc: The wearer can reduce Magic Resistance damage by 15%
The wearer clear Unclean Body and Nausea Buff
item.jerotesvillage.warlock_fake_tiara.d: The wearer can reduce Magic Resistance damage by 20%
The wearer is hit, there is a high chance to an ally or a non-hostile raider to take the damage on their behalf.
The wearer is hit, there is 20% chance to trigger Evil Summoning,10% chance to trigger Purple Sand Phantom.
item.jerotesvillage.totem_of_filthiness_: Consume to revive as a tough undead form. A follower of the Filthiness God, but now this follower follows you. Maximum of four.
item.jerotesvillage.slavery_supervisor_h: Defeating villagers or illagers has a chance to drop emeralds
item.jerotesvillage.slavery_supervisor_c: Defeating villagers or illagers has a chance to drop emeralds
item.jerotesvillage.slavery_supervisor_l: Defeating villagers or illagers has a chance to drop emeralds
item.jerotesvillage.slavery_supervisor_b: Defeating villagers or illagers has a chance to drop emeralds
item.jerotesvillage.ominous_probe.desc_0: Make the selected target the primary target for illagers, while ensuring these illagers do not become loyal to you
item.jerotesvillage.ominous_probe.desc_1: Using it transfers the Bad Omen to the target
item.jerotesvillage.music_disc_ominous_b: The Planets, Op 32: VI Uranus, the Magician
item.jerotesvillage.ominous_bomb.desc: Throwing for a period of time will cause an explosion and produce fragments and will not damage the blocks
item.jerotesvillage.ominous_javelin.desc: After hitting the throwing attack, temporarily disable the opponent's shield, after Loyalty enchanted, it becomes invalid
item.jerotesvillage.bitter_cold_sorcery_: When used in the off-hand, the spell becomes Bitter Cold Frostbite; when sneaking, the spell becomes Bitter Cold Altar.
When sneaking, casting with the main hand becomes Floating Force, and casting with the off-hand becomes Gravity Force.
item.jerotesvillage.slavery_supervisor_h: After swinging, there is a chance to bind creatures with a health value less than or equal to twice the user's health value
item.jerotesvillage.crazy_axe.desc: Continuous use can quickly swing, sprint, and attack nearby enemies
item.jerotesvillage.giant_monster_helmet: Will receive 16% Freeze damage after wearing
item.jerotesvillage.giant_monster_horned: Will receive 16% Freeze damage after wearing
item.jerotesvillage.giant_monster_chestp: Will receive 16% Freeze damage after wearing
item.jerotesvillage.giant_monster_leggin: Will receive 16% Freeze damage after wearing
Will receive 16% Freeze damage after wearing
block.jerotesvillage.enchanted_stone.des: Used to activate beacons and increase enchantment
item.jerotesvillage.evil_potion.desc: Quickly put it into the Hag's Cauldron ...
item.jerotesvillage.big_witchs_hat.desc_: The wearer can reduce magic damage by 30%
The wearer may gain Magic Absorption buff effect when encountering magical attacks
item.jerotesvillage.hag_eye.desc_0: Gain Night Vision effect when used And it can eliminate Blindness and Darkness effects
item.jerotesvillage.hag_eye.desc_1: Never use it to the extent of damage
item.jerotesvillage.hags_brush.desc: Can brush the Dirty Hag's Cauldron clean
Gain Night Vision effect when used And it can eliminate Blindness and Darkness effects
Can perceive the opponent's attributes, penetrate the target creature's invisibility
When held and shift key down, grants true sight, allowing visibility of all creatures
Never use it to the extent of damage
item.jerotesvillage.music_disc_purple_sa: Fantasia and Imitation in B minor, BWV 563
item.jerotesvillage.purple_sand_alchemy_: Throwing for a period of time will cause an explosion and will not damage the blocks
item.jerotesvillage.purple_sand_explosiv: Contact after throwing can cause an explosion and damage the blocks
item.jerotesvillage.fury_blamer_necroman: Fury Blamer Necromancy Warlock Spawn Egg
item.jerotesvillage.gemstone_throwing_kn: Can fire three throwing knives without any damage interval in a row
item.jerotesvillage.malignasaur_teeth.de: As armor pattern will reduce Drown damage by 8%
Obtain Magic Absorption and Saturation effects after eat
item.jerotesvillage.bright_golden_melon_: When both hands are Bright Golden Melon Hammers, will can accumulate energy to unleash range attacks
item.jerotesvillage.hero_soup.desc: Obtain Abundant Courage effects after eat And clear Weakness Anesthetized and Aback effect
item.jerotesvillage.villager_metal_throw: As a projectile, it has excellent ejection effect
It will cause damage to targets within a certain range And cause Bleeding effect
item.jerotesvillage.potion_throwing_ball: The deputy holding the potion can attach the effect of the potion when used
item.jerotesvillage.bright_bola.desc: Throw out small and medium-sized creatures that can restrain low health
item.jerotesvillage.pink_slime_ball.desc: Obtain Levitation and Slow Falling effects after eat
block.jerotesvillage.meror_projection_ta: Place representative items of powerful creatures in the second round world on top of them
item.jerotesvillage.throwing_ball: [Throwing Ball]When held it causes a level %1$s movement speed impact - Basic Damage %2$s points - Attachment Damage Multiplier %3$s points - The faster the movement speed, the higher the throwing damage
item.jerotesvillage.throwing_ball_glove: [Throwing Ball Glove]Group throwing items that can be thrown with the off hand Speed %1$s times faster
effect.jerotesvillage.carved_villager_ar: Heals villagers and Copper Carved Company entities，damages other; higher levels increase the effect potency.
effect.jerotesvillage.unclean_body.descr: Inflicts lethal damage over time; increases walking speed and melee damage; damage from entities will result in a greater loss of health; higher levels increase the effect potency.
effect.jerotesvillage.rampant.descriptio: Increases walking speed and melee damage; resist the shock of some entities; higher levels increase the effect potency.
effect.jerotesvillage.bitter_cold_protec: Increases entity reach and block reach; higher levels increase the effect potency.
effect.jerotesvillage.malignasaur_asphyx: Inflicts lethal damage over time; higher levels increase the effect potency; does not affect water entities; does not affect the entities having water breathing effect.
effect.jerotesvillage.ocean_dragon_deter: Affects the mobility of entities on the ground or in water; higher levels increase the effect potency.
effect.jerotesvillage.abundant_courage.d: Increases melee damage; resist the shock of some entities; higher levels increase the effect potency.
Increases maximum health; higher levels increase the effect potency.
effect.jerotesvillage.throwing_stubborn_: Increases walking speed; higher levels increase the effect potency.
effect.jerotesvillage.fairness.descripti: You will only be harmed by Celestial Coilvine and its allies.
effect.jerotesvillage.fragrance.descript: Bring nearby animals closer; Invalid for powerful animals.
effect.jerotesvillage.meror_stimulin.des: Heal entities; increases melee damage and attack speed and walking speed; higher levels increase the effect potency.
effect.jerotesvillage.wilderness_giant_p: Inflicts lethal damage over time; higher levels increase the effect potency.
effect.jerotesvillage.last_ditch.descrip: Significantly increase maximum health; damage from entities will result in a greater loss of health; higher levels increase the effect potency.
